text:
Welcome to the SeismicML Activity!

In this activity, you will work with data from the Raspberry Shake in your classroom! Follow the instructions below to idenitfy earthquakes in the data!

Instructions!!

Below is the data from a Raspberry Shake. To see the data from your classroom:

1) Drag the Raspberry Shake graph to the right side of the CLUE environment. Grab the tab in the top right and drag it over to the right side of the screen.

2) Go to the search bar in the top right, and type in the station name that your teacher tells you.

3) Press enter.

Here is an image of an earthquake signal. Scroll through the data to find a signal that matches this one. It may be on a different day!

[Insert image of earthquake signal in RS data]

QUESTIONS TO ANSWER

Drag this text tile to the right side of CLUE. Type answers to the questions below!

Question 1: What is the date and time of the earthquake signal that you found?

Question 2: Describe how the shape of the signal you found makes you think it is an earthquake.
